benefits.description: Hamstring/glute strain from 1RM deadlift attempt resolved completely. Could not sit on toilet without extreme pain; resolved after 1 month of high-dose stack.
Partial rotator cuff tear rehabilitated with stack and mobility coaching; avoided surgery

protocol_notes: Acute injury protocol: up to 1mg/day for 1 month. Chronic injury protocol: lower dose for 6-8 weeks, then 2-3 week break. Includes weekly mobility coach work and soft tissue work. Has 2 children under 3 years old. Views peptides as cost-effective compared to surgery and immobilization.
